title: impatiens ecornuta
intro: Impatiens ecornuta, also known as the Balsam flower or Policres, is a plant species belonging to the balsam family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Impatiens ecornuta include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as wound healing and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
